# TS9207

**Category:** Macro Syntax · **Severity:** Error

## Message

```
Function must have a body for {macro}
```

## Explanation

This macro requires a function with an implementation body.

Incorrect:
  @tailrec
  declare function factorial(n: number): number;  // No body

<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->
<!-- generated:end -->
